<!-- Thanks for sharing a workflow. Quick checklist: -->

## New / updated workflow

- **name:**
- **what the bot does:**

### Checklist

- [ ] One file `workflows/<Name>.ircbot`, exported from ircuitry.
- [ ] No connection or secret data (EXPORT strips these; CI also checks).
- [ ] `python3 tools/build_index.py` passes locally (or let CI check it).
- [ ] I read the Code nodes and they are safe and useful.
- [ ] I license this under the repo's MIT license.
